arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher on Pep Guardiola’s magic, whether he should leave Manchester City and their major mistake
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s magic is not gone but Manchester City will have to consider a change next season if things don’t improve. That’s according to Jamie Carragher, who has criticised the squad building at Manchester City in an interview with SportBILD today. arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham will try to sign 'incredible' Everton player who has already scored against Spurs
Southampton ignored £3m option to buy 'super' player who is now shining at Tottenham after £21m move
Man City will be 'RELEGATED' from Premier League, says Football Finance Expert
arts.sum: Football finance expert Kieran Maguire believes that Manchester City will be relegated if they are found guilty of their alleged 130 breaches of Premier League financial rules. "A points deduction would be the most likely outcome should the club be found guilty,” Maguire said on the Football on Trial: The Manchester City Charges podcast from BBC Radio 5 Live.

arts.ttl: Manager being ‘considered again’ by Manchester City – Will need convincing to succeed Guardiola
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen manager Xabi Alonso would be in the running for the Manchester City job, if Pep Guardiola decides to step away. That’s according to SportBILD, who say the Spanish boss would however need majorly convincing to take up the role. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man City Premier League clash simulated as three-game streak predicted
arts.sum: A 4-1 win against Ipswich Town saw Spurs pick up two Premier League wins in a row for the first time since September on the weekend, with Ange Postecoglou's side starting to look themselves again with a few players returning from injury. Tottenham will be looking to pick up a third win of the season against Manchester City when the two sides meet in the Premier League later today.
